    Index

    A B C D E G H I L M P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addScore(int) - Method in class Model.Hero
    Adds a specified value to the current score.
    applyBlastRadius(Hero, Map, ArrayList<Enemy>, ArrayList<Snake>) - Method in class Model.Bomb
    Applies the bomb’s blast effects to surrounding map cells.
    Attack(Hero) - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Attack Method: if the enemy is adjacent to the hero, it will attack and reduce the hero's lives by the enemy's damage value

    B

    Bomb - Class in Model
    Represents an explosive bomb that can be placed by the Hero to destroy enemies and breakable walls.
    Bomb(int, int, Map, Hero) - Constructor for class Model.Bomb
    Constructs a new Bomb at the specified position.

    C

    clearCanvas() - Method in class View.MainView
    Clears the entire canvas drawing area before the next frame is drawn.
    collect(Hero) - Method in class Model.ExtraLife
    Attempts to collect the Extra Life power-up by the Hero.
    collect(Hero) - Method in class Model.PowerUp
    Attempts to collect this power-up item by the Hero.
    collect(Hero, ArrayList<Enemy>, ArrayList<Snake>) - Method in class Model.Treasure
    Attempts to collect the treasure if the hero is at the same position and all enemies have been defeated.
    Control - package Control
     
    countdown(ArrayList<Enemy>, ArrayList<Snake>) - Method in class Model.Bomb
    Starts the bomb's countdown timer.

    D

    Die() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Sets the hero's isAlive status to false and triggers end-game logic.
    Die(Hero, Map) - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Die Method: sets isAlive to false and removes the enemy from the game, ADD points to hero's score
    Die(Hero, Map) - Method in class Model.Snake
    Marks the snake as dead, updates the map, and grants score to the hero.

    E

    Enemy - Class in Model
    Represents a basic enemy character in the game that moves randomly and attacks the hero.
    Enemy(String) - Constructor for class Model.Enemy
    Constructs a new Enemy with the specified name.
    explode(ArrayList<Enemy>, ArrayList<Snake>) - Method in class Model.Bomb
    Executes the bomb explosion, dealing damage to entities within the blast radius.
    ExtraLife - Class in Model
    Represents a power-up item in the game.
    ExtraLife(int, int) - Constructor for class Model.ExtraLife
    Constructs a new ExtraLife power-up at the specified map coordinates.

    G

    getBlastCoordinates() - Method in class Model.Bomb
    Gets the Blast coordinates from the bombs explosion
    getBombBlastRadius() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Gets the hero's current bomb blast radius.
    getCell(int, int) - Method in class Model.Map
    GetCell : reads the character at the curren position
    getCollected() - Method in class Model.PowerUp
    Checks the collection status of the power-up.
    getGrid() - Method in class Model.Map
    Gets the entire map grid.
    getHeight() - Method in class Model.Map
    Gets the height of the map.
    getIsAlive() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Checks if the hero is currently alive.
    getIsCollected() - Method in class Model.Treasure
    Gets whether the treasure has been collected.
    getLives() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Gets the current number of lives the hero has.
    getMap() - Method in class Model.Bomb
    Gets the map where the bomb is placed.
    getName() - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Gets the name of the enemy.
    getName() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Gets the name of the hero.
    getPositionX() - Method in class Model.Bomb
    Gets the X coordinate of the bomb.
    getPositionX() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Gets the current x-coordinate of the hero.
    getPositionX() - Method in class Model.PowerUp
    Gets the current x-coordinate of the power-up.
    getPositionX() - Method in class Model.Projectile
    Gets the current x-coordinate of the projectile.
    getPositionX() - Method in class Model.Treasure
    Gets the x-coordinate of the treasure's position.
    getPositionY() - Method in class Model.Bomb
    Gets the Y coordinate of the bomb.
    getPositionY() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Gets the current y-coordinate of the hero.
    getPositionY() - Method in class Model.PowerUp
    Gets the current y-coordinate of the power-up.
    getPositionY() - Method in class Model.Projectile
    Gets the current y-coordinate of the projectile.
    getPositionY() - Method in class Model.Treasure
    Gets the y-coordinate of the treasure's position.
    getScene() - Method in class View.MainView
    Returns the JavaFX scene containing the game view.
    getScore() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Gets the current score of the hero.
    getWidth() - Method in class Model.Map
    Gets the width of the map.
    getX() - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Gets the X coordinate of the enemy.
    getY() - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Gets the Y coordinate of the enemy.

    H

    hasExploded() - Method in class Model.Bomb
    Checks if the bomb has exploded.
    Hero - Class in Model
    Represents the player-controlled hero character in the game.
    Hero(String) - Constructor for class Model.Hero
    Constructs a new Hero with a specified name.

    I

    increaseBombBlastRadius(int) - Method in class Model.Hero
    Increases the hero's bomb blast radius by the specified amount.
    increaseLife(int) - Method in class Model.Hero
    Increases the hero's life count by the specified amount.
    isActive() - Method in class Model.Projectile
    Checks if the projectile is currently active and moving.
    isAlive() - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Checks if the enemy is alive.
    isValidPos(int, int) - Method in class Model.Map
    isValidPos : makes sure that the position the player moves to is within the map
    isWalkable(int, int) - Method in class Model.Map
    isWalkable : prevents enemies and heros from walking through walls

    L

    launch() - Method in class Model.Projectile
    Launches the projectile, moving it step by step until it hits the hero, goes out of bounds, or reaches its range.
    LivesProperty() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Gets the JavaFX IntegerProperty for the hero's lives.
    loadFile(String) - Method in class Model.Map
    FileLoad Method: loads a map from a text file Text file format: first line = height, second line = width, rest = map layout Breakable walls = '#', unbreakable walls = 'X', empty space = ' ', hero start = 'H', enemy start = 'E', treasure = 'T', snake = 'S'

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Control.Main
    The standard main method which launches the JavaFX application.
    Main - Class in Control
    The main entry point for the JavaFX application.
    Main() - Constructor for class Control.Main
     
    MainController - Class in Control
    The central controller for the game, managing the game loop, user input, state transitions (loading levels, win/loss), and coordinating updates between the Model (game logic) and the View (rendering).
    MainController(Stage) - Constructor for class Control.MainController
    Constructs the main controller, linking it to the primary stage and initializing the view.
    MainView - Class in View
    The View component of the MVC pattern, responsible for all visual rendering and displaying game state information (lives, score, level) using JavaFX.
    MainView() - Constructor for class View.MainView
    Initializes the entire view structure, including the canvas, the drawing context, and the layout for the information bar.
    Map - Class in Model
    Represents the game map/level, loaded from a text file.
    Map() - Constructor for class Model.Map
    Constructor to create an empty map
    Model - package Model
     
    Move(char, Map, ArrayList<Enemy>, ArrayList<Snake>) - Method in class Model.Hero
    Moves the hero according to player input and handles map interactions.
    Move(Map) - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Move Method: moves the enemy in a random direction Enemy can only move in walkable positions on the map
    Move(Map) - Method in class Model.Snake
    Overrides Enemy.Move: moves the snake in a random direction.

    P

    PlaceBomb(Map, ArrayList<Enemy>, ArrayList<Snake>) - Method in class Model.Hero
    Places a new Bomb at the hero’s current position, if a bomb does not already exist at the location.
    PowerUp - Class in Model
    Represents a power-up item in the game.
    PowerUp(int, int) - Constructor for class Model.PowerUp
    Constructs a new PowerUp (Blast Radius Power-Up) at the specified coordinates.
    Projectile - Class in Model
    Represents a projectile fired by a Snake enemy.
    Projectile(int, int, int, int, int, Map, Hero) - Constructor for class Model.Projectile
    Constructs a new Projectile at the specified position with a direction and range.

    R

    renderBombs(ArrayList<Bomb>) - Method in class View.MainView
    Renders all active Bomb objects, including the bomb sprite ('B') and the full blast radius when the bomb explodes ('!').
    renderEnemies(ArrayList<Enemy>) - Method in class View.MainView
    Renders all active generic Enemy objects.
    renderHero(Hero) - Method in class View.MainView
    Renders the Hero at their current grid position.
    renderMap(Map) - Method in class View.MainView
    Renders the static and breakable map elements based on the content of the Map grid.
    renderPowerUps(ArrayList<PowerUp>) - Method in class View.MainView
    Renders all active, uncollected PowerUp objects.
    renderProjectiles(ArrayList<Projectile>) - Method in class View.MainView
    Renders active Projectile objects.
    renderSnakes(ArrayList<Snake>) - Method in class View.MainView
    Renders all active Snake enemy objects.
    resetBombBlastRadius() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Resets the bomb blast radius to the Hero.BASE_RADIUS.

    S

    ScoreProperty() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Gets the JavaFX IntegerProperty for the hero's score.
    setAlive(boolean) - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Sets the alive status of the enemy.
    setCell(int, int, char) - Method in class Model.Map
    SetCell : changes the character at x,y
    setIsCollected(boolean) - Method in class Model.PowerUp
    Sets the collection status of the power-up.
    setLives(int) - Method in class Model.Hero
    Sets the hero's lives to a specific value.
    setPosition(int, int) - Method in class Model.Enemy
    Sets the position of the enemy.
    setPosition(int, int) - Method in class Model.Hero
    Sets the hero's position to the specified coordinates.
    setScore(int) - Method in class Model.Hero
    Sets the hero's score to a specific value.
    setX(int) - Method in class Model.PowerUp
    Sets a new x-coordinate for the power-up.
    setY(int) - Method in class Model.PowerUp
    Sets a new y-coordinate for the power-up.
    Snake - Class in Model
    Represents a Snake enemy that extends the basic Enemy class.
    Snake(String) - Constructor for class Model.Snake
    Inherits the Contructor of Enemy
    Spit(Hero, Map) - Method in class Model.Snake
    Spit Move: spits a projectile in the direction of the hero...
    start(Stage) - Method in class Control.Main
    The primary entry point for the JavaFX application thread.
    startGame() - Method in class Control.MainController
    Initializes the game, loads the first level, sets up input handlers, configures the stage, and starts the main game AnimationTimer loop.

    T

    TakeDamage() - Method in class Model.Hero
    Reduces the hero's lives by 1 when they take damage.
    Treasure - Class in Model
    Represents a collectible treasure that the hero must collect to complete a level.
    Treasure(int, int) - Constructor for class Model.Treasure
    Constructs a new Treasure at the specified position.

    U

    updateInfo(int, int, int) - Method in class View.MainView
    Updates the score, lives, and level information displayed in the top bar.

    V

    View - package View
